reasoning_content:
Let me start by understanding the task structure and exploring the codebase to complete Task 0: Environment Setup.

According to the instructions:
1. Task 0 is about environment preparation - just need to build the `task0` target without modifying any code
2. Score: 100 points if the program exits normally
3. I should not modify any files in task/0/

Let me first explore the project structure to understand what we're working with.

task_list.title: Task 0: Environment Setup - Build and verify task0 target
task_list.notes: Build task0 target, run score evaluation, should get 100 points if program exits normally

task_list.title: Task 1: Lexer - Implement token stream generation with ANTLR
task_list.notes: Modify task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4, output tokens matching clang -cc1 -dump-tokens format

task_list.title: Task 2: Parser - Generate JSON AST from token stream
task_list.notes: Use bison or antlr to parse tokens into JSON AST

task_list.title: Task 3: IR Generation - Convert AST to LLVM IR
Task 4: IR Optimization - Optimize LLVM IR
Task 5: Backend Code Generation - Generate RV64 Assembly

tool_call.name: task_tracker
tool_call.arguments: {"command": "plan", "task_list": [{"title": "Task 0: Environment Setup - Build and verify task0 target", "status": "in_progress", "notes": "Build task0 target, run score evaluation, should get 100 points if program exits normally"}, {"title": "Task 1: Lexer - Implement token stream generation with ANTLR", "status": "todo", "notes": "Modify task/1/antlr/SYsULexer.g4, output tokens matching clang -cc1 -dump-tokens format"}, {"title": "Task 2: Parser - Generate JSON AST from token stream", "status": "todo", "notes": "Use bison or antlr to parse tokens into JSON AST"}, {"title": "Task 3: IR Generation - Convert AST to LLVM IR", "status": "todo", "notes": "Modify task/3/EmitIR.hpp and task/3/EmitIR.cpp"}, {"title": "Task 4: IR Optimization - Optimize LLVM IR", "status": "todo", "notes": "Implement optimization passes, score = sqrt(std_time/student_time) * 100"}, {"title": "Task 5: Backend Code Generation - Generate RV64 Assembly", "status": "todo", "notes": "Implement 4 functions in task/5/EmitMIR.cpp"}]}
